template: Fine-grained positional K-only sweep (10 decile bins + V control) — Qwen-Base
prediction_outcome: Scenario B confirmed (30% pre-registered) — encoding-independent saturation
key_finding: Qwen-Base accuracy saturated at 0-4% for ALL position deciles, identical to Llama. Text gradient 15→95% (r=0.997, slope=8.9pp/bin). K > V +52pp at bin 9. Digital encoding does NOT protect at 10% dose. Positional dissociation structure is encoding-independent.
evidence_impact: Establishes encoding-independence of positional dissociation; extends K > V to Qwen at fine resolution; qualifies V-immunity (V-direction at 10% = 56% not 100%)
next_planned: 5% dose 10-decile sweep on both models to reveal encoding-dependent accuracy gradients below saturation threshold

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. Positional dissociation confirmed (text gradient).

positional_dissociation.status: Encoding-independent: both Qwen-Base and Llama show identical patterns at 10% dose (text 15→95% linear, acc~0%). 5% dose needed for accuracy gradients.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL (5/5 models). +52pp Qwen, +55pp Llama at bin 9. Independently confirmed by AsymKV.

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. TC best protection metric.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE: 4 families, 5 training variants, GQA + MHA, Base + Instruct. Positional sweep now on 2 models.

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY + encoding-independence at 10% dose confirmed.
